title: P2-001: Confirm Phase 2 entry gates
body:
Source: `docs/phase2-backlog.md`

Done when:

Windows clone records `Tools/windows/run_phase2_entry_validation.ps1` output, `quality_gate.py --require-ue`, `unreal_gate.py --platform Win64 --include-server`, dedicated-server boot, client-join, ready-lobby, and key smoke profile evidence in a cycle file

Validation evidence:

- [ ] Command output or cycle link added
- [ ] Result recorded in a cycle file
- [ ] No raw logs, recordings, or personal identifiers committed
